hausa.the_earliest_fraction_notation_dates_t: Rubutun kaso na farko ya samo asali daga Masar ta dā kimanin 1800 KZ. Masarawa sun yi amfani da «kaso na raka'a» — kaso masu lambar sama 1 kaɗai (kamar 1/2, 1/3, 1/4). Sun rubuta kowane kaso a matsayin jimlar kaso na raka'a: 2/5 = 1/3 + 1/15. Rubutun layi na zamani (lambar sama a kan lambar ƙasa) ya fito daga masana lissafi na Larabawa na tsakiyar zamani kimanin 1200 AZ.
hausa.where_do_the_fraction_words_come_from: Daga ina kalmomin kaso suke fitowa?
hausa.numerator_comes_from_the_latin_numerar: «Numerator» (lambar sama) ya fito daga Latin «numerare» (ƙidaya) — yana ƙidaya sassa nawa. «Denominator» (lambar ƙasa) ya fito daga «denominare» (ba da suna) — yana ba da suna girman sassa. Tare: lambar ƙasa tana ba da suna wane irin yanka; lambar sama tana ƙidaya nawa daga cikin waɗannan yankan kake da su.
hausa.decimals_as_we_know_them_were_populari: Dashi-dashi kamar yadda muka san su Simon Stevin ya shahara da su a 1585 a littafinsa «De Thiende» (Na Goma). Kafin haka, kaso ne kaɗai hanyar bayyana lambobi marasa cika. Digon dashi-dashi an karɓe shi a duk duniya ne kawai a shekarun 1700.
hausa.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: «Percent» (kashi) ya fito daga Latin «per centum» — «cikin ɗari». Don haka 25% a zahiri yana nufin 25 cikin 100, ko 25/100. Alamar % ta samo asali daga gajeriyar «per c.» a rubutun kasuwanci na Italiya na ƙarni na 15.
hausa.the_reciprocal_of_a_b_is_b_a_flip_it_u: Juyayyen a/b shi ne b/a — juya shi baya. Kowane kaso wanda ba sifili ba yana da juyayye. Sakamakon ninka kaso da juyayyensa koyaushe 1 ne: (3/4) × (4/3) = 12/12 = 1. Shi ya sa raba da kaso yake daidai da ninka da juyayyensa.
hausa.why_is_1_2_the_most_used_fraction: Me yasa 1/2 shi ne kaso da aka fi amfani da shi?
hausa.1_2_is_the_most_common_fraction_in_eve: 1/2 shi ne kaso da aka fi sani a maganar yau da kullum saboda yana zaune daidai a tsakiyar 0 da 1. Shi ne kuma kaso ɗaya tak da muka saba bayyanawa da kalmomi: «rabi» maimakon «ɗaya kan biyu». Sauran harsuna kuma suna da kalmomi na musamman ga 1/3 da 1/4 (sulusi, kwata).
hausa.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza cikakken samfurin kaso ne saboda da'ira ce (don haka dukkan yanka suna fita daga tsakiya), yankan suna da sauƙin ƙidayawa, kuma wannan samfurin ya dace da ma'anar lissafi ta hukuma: kaso n/d yankan n daidai ne daga cikin jimlar yankan d daidai.
hausa.when_fractions_are_not_enough: Lokacin da kaso ba su isa ba
hausa.some_numbers_like_and_2_cannot_be_writ: Wasu lambobi, kamar π da √2, ba za a iya rubuta su a matsayin kaso na lambobi biyu cika ba. Ana kiran waɗannan lambobi marasa hankali. An ce mabiyan Pythagoras (kimanin 500 KZ) sun kashe masanin lissafi Hippasus lokacin da ya tabbatar cewa √2 ba za a iya rubutawa a matsayin kaso ba.
hausa.any_real_number_can_be_written_as_a_co: Kowace lamba ta gaskiya za a iya rubutawa a matsayin «kaso mai ci gaba» — kaso mai gida-gida kamar 1 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + ...))). Wannan yana ba da mafi kyawun kimar kaso. Daga farkon istilahi kaɗan π ≈ 22/7; mafi kyau shi ne 355/113.
hausa.musical_pitch_ratios_are_fractions_the: Ma'aunin sautin waƙa kaso ne. Oktaba rabo ne na 2:1 (mitar ta ninka). Cikakke na biyar 3:2 ne. Babba na uku 5:4 ne. Pythagoras ya gano cewa sauƙaƙan rabo na lambobi cika suna samar da sautuka masu daɗi.
hausa.why_the_common_denominator: Me yasa lambar ƙasa ta bai ɗaya?
hausa.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Pizza biyu za a iya haɗa su ne kawai idan an yanka su zuwa yanka na girma ɗaya. Lambobin ƙasa daban = yanka na girma daban = ba za a iya haɗawa kai tsaye ba. Lambar ƙasa ta bai ɗaya a zahiri tana nufin «yanka na girma ɗaya».
hausa.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Matsakaicin bugu kamar 0.333 yana nufin 1/3 na ƙwallaye suna samar da buga. ERA na mai jefa ƙwallo, kashi na on-base, kashi na slugging — dukansu kaso ne. Besabur, wanda ya fara a shekarun 1850, shi ne wasanni na farko da ya shahara da irin wannan tunani na kididdiga.
hausa.georges_cuisenaire_was_a_belgian_prima: Georges Cuisenaire malamin firamare ne na Belgium a shekarun 1950 wanda ya ƙirƙira sandunan launi masu tsawon 1 zuwa 10 don taimaka wa yara su fahimci dangantakar lamba har da kaso. «Bangon kaso» da kake gani a azuzuwa da yawa shi ne zuriyar dijital na sandunansa na zahiri.
hausa.the_chinese_mathematical_text_nine_cha: Rubutun lissafi na Sinawa «Nine Chapters on the Mathematical Art» (kimanin 100 KZ) ya haɗa da lissafin kaso, har da tsari na nemo lambobin ƙasa na bai ɗaya wanda a lissafance ya yi daidai da abin da muke koyarwa yau.
hausa.computers_store_decimal_fractions_in_b: Kwamfutoci suna ajiye kaso na dashi-dashi a binary. Dashi-dashi 0.1 ba za a iya wakilta shi daidai a binary ba — yana zama kaso mai maimaituwa a tushe 2. Shi ya sa a harsunan shirye-shirye 0.1 + 0.2 wani lokacin yana ba da 0.30000000000000004.

hausa.let_your_number_be_n_the_sequence_n_1_: Bari lambarka ta zama n. Jerin: (n+1) × 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n + 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n. Raba da 2 → n. Cire na asali → 0. Jira — wannan yana ba da 0, ba 1 ba. Gwada: n → (n+1)×2 = 2n+2 → +4 = 2n+6 → −6 = 2n → ÷2 = n → −na asali = 0. «Dabarar» tana dogara ne kan lambobi ɓoyayyu a jeri.
hausa.each_term_is_half_the_previous_the_tot: Kowace istilahi rabin da ta gabata ce. Jimla tana kusanci 1 amma ba ta kai gaba ɗaya. Wannan jeri ne na geometric mara iyaka mai istilahin farko 1/2 da rabo 1/2: S = (1/2) / (1 − 1/2) = 1. Shi ya sa sabanin motsi na Zeno za a iya warware shi a lissafance.
hausa.even_though_each_term_is_small_the_ser: Ko da yake kowace istilahi ƙarama ce, jerin yana watsewa. Don wuce 100, kana buƙatar kimanin istilahi 1.5 × 10^43. An tabbatar da wannan da Nicole Oresme a shekarun 1300 ta amfani da ƙungiyoyi: 1/3 + 1/4 > 1/4 + 1/4 = 1/2; 1/5+...+1/8 > 4 × 1/8 = 1/2; koyaushe za ka iya samun wani 1/2 na ƙarawa.
hausa.check_1_4_and_1_3_4_1_1_3_1_check_2_5_: Duba 1/4 da 1/3: (4)(1) − (1)(3) = 1. Duba 2/5 da 1/2: (5)(1) − (2)(2) = 1. Wannan kadara tana samar da itacen Stern-Brocot na dukkan lambobin hankali.
hausa.rewrite_1_2_2_3_3_4_n_1_n_the_2_in_2_3: Sake rubuta: 1/2 × 2/3 × 3/4 × ... × (n−1)/n. 2 a 2/3 yana soke 2 a lambar ƙasa na 1/2. 3 a 3/4 yana soke 3 a lambar ƙasa na 2/3. Komai yana sokewa sai 1/n.
